properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v2 v4 v6 v7 v5 v8 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I pray into the atmosphere Spirit of God, You're here You have all authority I pray over my heart and mind I am healed by Your stripes Your blood declares that I am free

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the mighty name of Jesus, I pray Calling on the power of Heaven, I proclaim Every weapon formed against me, must break In the mighty name of Jesus

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I draw a permanent boundary line The enemy has no rights to come near my family No scheme could ever undo God's plans No matter the circumstance The cross has sealed my destiny

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the mighty name of Jesus, I know All the power of fear and darkness, must go He's every key to every victory, I hold In the mighty name of Jesus

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will not fear, I will not fear When the enemy comes near On the door frame of my life Is the blood of Jesus Christ I will not fear, I will not fear There's an army of angels here I'm protected on all sides By the blood of Jesus Christ

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It's in the mighty name of Jesus It's in the mighty name of Jesus It's in the mighty name of Jesus Oh, the name of Jesus There's no higher name There's no greater name It holds all authority All powers it's in His name Oh, we're just beginnin' to lift up His name of Jesus in this place

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We declare You have the power, You have the power Oh, The name of Jesus There's no other name There's no other name

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: In the mighty name of Jesus, I pray Calling on the power of Heaven, I proclaim (I proclaim) Every weapon formed against me, must break In the mighty name of Jesus
